basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Community Mobilizer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development Recruitment 2026 notification is out for 1 Community Mobilizer post on a contract basis. Candidates with Plus-Two and above qualification can apply through email mode on or before 27-05-2026. candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMD Kerala Community Mobilizer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Centre for Management Development Community Mobilizer Recruitment 2026
